title: boraginella mollis
intro: Boraginella mollis, also known as the soft-leaved shepherds purse, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Boraginaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Boraginella mollis include reducing inflammation and pain, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Boraginella mollis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be used topically in the form of a salve or cream to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
